_source: Transcribed from TTS mod tile/board art (Tiles, Boss Tiles, Mega Boss Tiles bags); verified by numbered node/edge overlays over each face.
_rules: Nodes per core rulebook p.10: adjacency is 8-way (orthogonal + diagonal within one lattice step); max 3 models per node, 1 boss. Entry nodes = basic nodes along a doorway wall. Node terrain names match encounters.json (primarySpawn..quaternaryTerrain).

faces.special: Mini boss tile. Boss spawns on the miniBossSpawn node.
Mini boss tile. Boss spawns on the miniBossSpawn node.
Main boss tile. Boss spawns on the mainBossSpawn node.
Main boss tile. Boss spawns on the mainBossSpawn node.

Four Kings mega board, encounter side (one L4 encounter). No doorway printed in the art; S doorway is convention (spiral stair at the SE corner). Doorway aligns with a Bonfire doorway (or an L3 tile in campaigns).
Four Kings arena. King One starts on the megaBossSpawn node; Royal Summons places kings 2-4 on the same node (occupants pushed as per Leap). Fog Gate token on the S doorway.
Old Iron King mega board, encounter side (one L4 encounter). S doorway through the castle wall aligns with a Bonfire doorway (or an L3 tile in campaigns).
Old Iron King arena. OIK starts on the ironKing node opposite the S doorway (top eye). The lava sea beyond the node field is a tile wall for movement and pushes. Fog Gate token on the S doorway.
Kalameet mega board, encounter side (one L4 encounter). S doorway (rope ladder into the gorge) aligns with a Bonfire doorway (or an L3 tile in campaigns).
Kalameet arena. Kalameet starts on the megaBossSpawn node, front arc facing board centre. Fog Gate token on the S doorway.
